title: Examples, Delimiters, Templates, and Structured Output · Contract Clinic: Schema Output
summary: Stabilize a classification and extraction prompt across varied inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt schema output increment in a tested prompt template with diverse examples. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use explicit schemas and validation when downstream code requires structured output.
Separate instructions, context, examples, and variable data with clear headings or provider-appropriate tags.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
